summary: This is a brief link post where Atwood recommends a presentation by Wil Shipley about developing Mac software. Shipley, creator of Delicious Library, shares insights on indie software success, having earned $54,000 on launch day without advertising. Atwood describes the talk as both humorous and genuinely inspiring, giving it a strong endorsement to his readers.
key_points: Wil Shipley's Delicious Library earned $54,000 on day one with zero advertising spend
The talk covers why developing for Mac specifically can be advantageous
Indie software success is possible through quality product and platform choice
The presentation balances humor with practical business insights
money_quotes: One of the funniest and most oddly inspiring things I've read in a long time.
key_insight: Indie developers can achieve remarkable commercial success by choosing the right platform and focusing on product quality over marketing spend.
